auth_methods.concise_evidence_snippet: The Attio Developer Platform consists of four parts: ... REST API ... App SDK. (No explicit authentication methods mentioned)

access_model.concise_evidence_snippet: Start for free... API and webhook access. Free. Per user/month, billed monthlyannually. For individuals getting started.

credentials_obtainable_without_approval.concise_evidence_snippet: Start for free, no credit card required. API and webhook access is available on the Free plan.

public_api_status.concise_evidence_snippet: The Attio Developer Platform consists of four parts: ... REST API. This allows developers to build apps.

api_breadth.concise_evidence_snippet: REST API ... allows developers to build apps that read and write information to and from Attio workspaces. subscribe to events using webhooks.

mcp_status.concise_evidence_snippet: ## MCP Manage Attio via AI. Connect Claude, ChatGPT or your AI tool of choice to search, update and manage your Attio workspace.

buildability_verdict.concise_evidence_snippet: API and webhook access is available for Free plan, self-serve. Auth methods are unclear.

primary_blocker.concise_evidence_snippet: The documentation for the REST API and App SDK does not detail specific authentication methods such as OAuth or API keys.
